result:
**Goal: Add alternative topological surface modes — Klein bottle, Möbius strip, and bounded (no wrap) — selectable alongside the current toroidal wrapping.**

Right now the grid always wraps toroidally (both axes wrap normally). Adding Klein bottle (one axis reverses on wrap), Möbius strip (single reversed wrap), and a bounded/dead-edge mode would let users explore how topology fundamentally alters pattern evolution — gliders that return mirror-flipped, oscillators that break symmetry at boundaries, and entirely new emergent dynamics. This is mathematically rich, fits naturally into the existing simulation core, and no other terminal CA simulator offers it. Cycle through topologies with a single keypress (e.g., `T`).
